name: Paisley
description: Teardrop boteh curling across the cloth, each one nested with a paler heart — every redraw re-stamps the print.

code.style: --heart: @p(var(--color0), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* outer and inner boteh share one emitted dye and turn */ --dye2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4)); --pturn: @r(360deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 12%; clip-path: @shape(drop); background: @var(--dye2); transform: rotate(@var(--pturn)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 30%; clip-path: @shape(drop); background: var(--heart); opacity: 0.85; transform: rotate(@var(--pturn)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
